canExpire.description: Checks if the unlocker's license system has an expiration date.

checkExpirationData.description: If the unlocker has an expiration date, it will check it against the RSA encoded time string from the server.

checkMuseHub.description: If you use the MuseHub SDK this will try to activate the plugin using their SDK.

contains.description: Checks if the string contains the given substring.

getLicenseKeyFile.description: Returns the license key file as File object.

getRegisteredMachineId.description: Returns the machine ID that is encoded into the license file. This does not look in the encrypted blob, but just parses the header string.

getUserEmail.description: Returns the user email that was used for the registration.

isUnlocked.description: Checks if the registration went OK.

isValidKeyFile.description: Checks if the possibleKeyData might contain a key file.

keyFileExists.description: Checks whether the key file exists.

loadExpansionList.description: Reloads the expansion list if the unlocker manages expansions.

loadKeyFile.description: This checks if there is a key file and applies it.

setProductCheckFunction.description: Sets a function that performs a product name check and expects to return true or false for a match.

unlockExpansionList.description: Unlocks the given expansion IDs in HISE.

writeExpansionKeyFile.description: Writes the expansion license key data to the location.

writeKeyFile.description: Writes the key data to the location.
